title: festuca ligustica var. hispidula
intro: Festuca ligustica var. hispidula, also known as Calabrian fescue, is a variety of the Festuca ligustica plant, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Calabrian fescue include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Calabrian fescue can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
